heading: Foreign student monitoring program
label: 1761 Foreign student monitoring program

Abolition of Immigration and Naturalization Service and Transfer of FunctionsFor abolition of Immigration and Naturalization Service, transfer of functions, and treatment of related references, see note set out under .section 1551 of this title
amendments: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (a) of amended .section 501 of Pub. L. 107–173section 501 of Pub. L. 107–173section 1372 of this title

children.heading: Information required of the visa applicant
children.label: b Information required of the visa applicant

children.text: The alien’s address in the country of origin.
The names and addresses of the alien’s spouse, children, parents, and siblings.
The names of contacts of the alien in the alien’s country of residence who could verify information about the alien.
Previous work history, if any, including the names and addresses of employers.

children.heading: Restrictions on issuance of visas
children.label: A Restrictions on issuance of visas
i
children.text: the Department of State has received from an approved institution of higher education or other approved educational institution electronic evidence of documentation of the alien’s acceptance at that institution; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the consular officer has adequately reviewed the applicant’s visa record.

children.heading: Notification upon visa issuance
children.label: B Notification upon visa issuance
children.text: Upon the issuance of a visa under section 1101(a)(15)(F) or (M) of this title to an alien, the Secretary of State shall transmit to the Immigration and Naturalization Service a notification of the issuance of that visa.

children.heading: Notification upon admission of alien
children.label: C Notification upon admission of alien
children.text: The Immigration and Naturalization Service shall notify the approved institution of higher education or other approved educational institution that an alien accepted for such institution or program has been admitted to the United States.

children.heading: Notification of failure of enrollment
children.label: D Notification of failure of enrollment
children.text: Not later than 30 days after the deadline for registering for classes for an academic term, the approved institution of higher education or other approved educational institution shall inform the Immigration and Naturalization Service through data-sharing arrangements of any failure of any alien described in subparagraph (C) to enroll or to commence participation.

children.heading: Requirement to submit list of approved institutions
children.label: 2 Requirement to submit list of approved institutions
children.text: Not later than 30 days after , the Attorney General shall provide the Secretary of State with a list of all approved institutions of higher education and other approved educational institutions that are authorized to receive nonimmigrants under section 1101(a)(15)(F) or (M) of this title.May 14, 2002

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: 3 Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out this subsection.
